hero.title: Pure Sweet Flavor
hero.subtitle: Discover handcrafted milk tea made from the most natural ingredients. Every cup is a lovingly crafted masterpiece to bring a smile to your face.

menuSection.sectionSubtitle: Top 10 most-loved beverages with exclusive recipes from Mật Ngọt Tea

gallery.sectionSubtitle: Where your sweetest moments are preserved
gallery.mainDesc: A space flooded with golden sunlight and tranquility

items.name: Linh Chi
items.text: The milk tea here is gently sweet, the pearls are super chewy and delicious. And the cafe has so many cute photo spots!

items.name: Hoàng Nam
items.text: I come here often to study. Quiet atmosphere, chill music and the salt coffee is absolutely top-tier.

items.name: Minh Anh
items.text: The cafe is super cute, from the decor to the packaging. Diverse menu at very student-friendly prices.

contact.address: 123 Pastel Street, Dream Ward, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City
contact.mapLabel: Mật Ngọt Tea is right here!

footer.desc: Bringing handcrafted milk tea to your hands with all sincerity and sweetness.
